text:
The first paragraph introduces the plaintext fixture. It is separated from the
next block by a single blank line, which is the only boundary the plaintext
chunker understands.

The second paragraph is short.

The third paragraph is a little longer so that, taken together with the others,
the merge pass has something to combine when a reasonable minimum chunk size is
configured for the test.

The fourth and final paragraph closes the file with one last block of prose.
